title: Design workflow configuration
description: Define how 'close' behaves with configurable workflows, including explicit open vs closed state sets and per-issue-type workflow mappings. Update CLI/API contracts accordingly.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Implemented unified status and workflow configuration system:

✅ Statuses list as single source of truth for status order, colors, and collapsed state
✅ Removed status_colors in favor of co-located status metadata  
✅ Column order now determined by statuses list order (fixes BTreeMap alphabetical issue)
✅ Clickable column headers for collapse/expand
✅ Restored filter button in top navigation
✅ Fixed collapsed column state persistence across snapshot updates
✅ Comprehensive validation ensuring workflow references exist in statuses

All backend (Rust/Python), frontend (TypeScript/React), config, and test files updated.

Child issue tskl-nlh.3 remains open for UI polish (animations, localStorage persistence).
